Name: iMaxNumCorpses
Description: range: 0-2000

Name: iMaxNumRagdolls
Description: range: 0-100

Name: fFirstPersonFieldOfView
Description: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment for first person. Range: 55.0-100.0

Name: fThirdPersonFieldOfView
Description: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment for third person. Range: 55.0-100.0

Name: iBloodStains
Description: 0 - off, 1 - near player only, 2 - on

Name: fBloodMultiplier
Description: Determines the amount and velocity of blood particle effects.

Name: fDamageToSelf
Description: Range: 0.1-1.0. Operations: options_get_damage_to_player, options_set_damage_to_player.

Name: fDamageToFriends
Description: Range: 0.1-1.0. Operations: options_get_damage_to_friends, options_set_damage_to_friends.

Name: iBannerMode
Description: 0 - none, 1 - on group, 2 - on friendlies, 3 - on everyone

Name: iBannerOutlineMode
Description: 0 - none, 1 - on group, 2 - on friendlies, 3 - on everyone

Name: bDynamicBannerTransparency
Description: Use dynamic banner transparency depending on distance or fixed.

Name: iAttackControl
Description: 0 - by relative enemy position, 1 - by inverse mouse movement, 2 - by mouse movement, 3 - by movement keys

Name: iMountedAttackControl
Description: 0 - by relative enemy position, 1 - by inverse mouse movement, 2 - by mouse movement, 3 - by movement keys

Name: iDefendControl
Description: 0 - automatic, 1 - by mouse movement, 2 - by movement keys, 3 - by inverse mouse movement

Name: iMountedDefendControl
Description: 0 - automatic, 1 - by mouse movement, 2 - by movement keys, 3 - by inverse mouse movement

Name: iLanceControl
Description: 0 - automatic, 1 - manual (easy), 2 - manual (hard)

Name: iHorseCameraMode
Description: 0 - never, 1 - ranged only, 2 - melee only, 3 - always

Name: iCombatSpeed
Description: 0 - slowest, 1 - slower, 2 - normal, 3 - faster, 5 - fastest. Operations: options_get_combat_speed, options_set_combat_speed.

Name: fBattleSize
Description: Range: 0.0-10.0. Operations: options_get_battle_size, options_set_battle_size.

Name: iBattleSizeMin
Description: The minimum value for a visual display of the size of the battle, depending on fBattleSize.

Name: iBattleSizeMax
Description: The maximum value for a visual display of the size of the battle, depending on fBattleSize.

Name: iNumWalkSamplePoints
Description: Used for animation progress with arf_use_inv_walk_progress or arf_use_walk_progress flags.

Name: fStrafeCooldown
Description: Cooldown for walking action strafe.

Name: fMinInflictedDamageForHighDamageHit
Description: Affects hit sound for melee weapon.

Name: iMinSoakedDamageForHighArmorHit
Description: Affects hit sound for melee weapon.

Name: bWeaponsCollideWithGround
Description: Enable weapon collision with ground.

Name: bNoJumpingWhileAttackingMelee
Description: Determines if an agent can jumping while melee attack.

Name: bNoJumpingWhileAttackingThrowing
Description: Determines if an agent can jumping while throwing attack.

Name: bNoJumpingWhileAttackingRanged
Description: Determines if an agent can jumping while ranged attack.

Name: bNoAttackingWhileJumpingMelee
Description: Determines if an agent can melee attack while jumping.

Name: bNoAttackingWhileJumpingThrowing
Description: Determines if an agent can throwing attack while jumping.

Name: bNoAttackingWhileJumpingRanged
Description: Determines if an agent can ranged attack while jumping.

Name: iMaxNumPrunableMissionObjects
Description: When this limit is reached, deletes the oldest prunable mission object.

Name: vStickItemToLeftHandOffset
Description: Used for flag arf_stick_item_to_left_hand.

Name: fMinActionProgressForAllyCollision
Description: Operation: set_ally_collision_threshold.

Name: fMaxActionProgressForAllyCollision
Description: Operation: set_ally_collision_threshold.

Name: fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionThrust
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingRight
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingLeft
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMinActionProgressForPropCollisionOverswing
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionThrust
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingRight
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionSwingLeft
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fMaxActionProgressForPropCollisionOverswing
Description: Operation: set_prop_collision_threshold.

Name: fRangedDamageToPropsFactor
Description: Damage multiplier to props for ranged weapon.

Name: fCouchedDamageToPropsFactor
Description: Damage multiplier to props for couched attack.

Name: fBonusDamageToPropsFactor
Description: Damage multiplier to props if the weapon has a flag itp_bonus_against_shield.

Name: fFallDamageMultiplier
Description: Scale fall damage.

Name: fHorseChargeDamageMultiplier
Description: Scale charge damage inflicted by horses when ramming into human agents.

Name: fCouchedLanceDamageMultiplier
Description: Scale couched lance damage.

Name: fMissileDamageSpeedPower
Description: Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2.0 makes damage scale with the square of missile’s speed. You can set it to 1.0 to make it scale linearly.

Name: fMeleeDamageSpeedPower
Description: Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2.0 makes damage scale with the square of weapon’s speed. You can set it to 1.0 to make it scale linearly.

Name: fShieldPenetrationOffset
Description: Missiles with (damage > shield_penetration_offset + shield_penetration_factor * shield) will penetrate a shield and cause damage to the wielder.

Name: fShieldPenetrationFactor
Description: Used in conjunction with shield_penetration_offset to determine if a missile can penetrate a shield.

Name: fAirFrictionArrow
Description: Set the drag coefficient.

Name: fAirFrictionBullet
Description: Set the drag coefficient for bullets.

Name: fExtraSoakFactor
Description: Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penetration to determine at what level extra penetration is soaked by armor.

Name: fExtraReduceFactor
Description: Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penetration to determine at what level extra penetration is reduced by armor.

Name: fCutSoakFactor
Description: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from cut damage due to armor.

Name: fCutReduceFactor
Description: Determines the percentage reduction from the cut damage.

Name: fBluntSoakFactor
Description: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from blunt damage due to armor.

Name: fBluntReduceFactor
Description: Determines the percentage reduction from the blunt damage.

Name: fPierceSoakFactor
Description: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from pierce damage due to armor.

Name: fPierceReduceFactor
Description: Determines the percentage reduction from the pierce damage.

Name: fCrushthroughThreshold
Description: Determines how much damage is required to crush through overhead blocks on weapons with the appropriate flag itp_crush_through.

Name: fInterruptThreshold
Description: Damage below this will not interrupt melee attacks.

Name: fInterruptThresholdMultiplayer
Description: Damage below this will not interrupt melee attacks in multiplayer.

Name: fBrokenShieldPruneTime
Description: Seconds required before a broken shield is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.

Name: fDroppedItemPruneTime
Description: Seconds required before a dropped item is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.

Name: fMissileItemPruneTime
Description: Seconds required before a fired arrow is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.

Name: iWeaponTrails
Description: Weapon trails with motion blur. 0 - none, 1 - partial, 2 - full

Name: bDismountHorseOnUse
Description: Dismount when looking at a horse and pressing gk_action.

Name: bShowMultiplayerGold
Description: Determines if the player’s gold is shown in multiplayer.

Name: bMultiplayerWalkEnabled
Description: Determines if the players on a multiplayer server can use gk_walk to walk instead of run.

Name: bDropAllItemsOnDeath
Description: Drop all item on death or only wielded.

Name: bDisableZoom
Description: Determines whether or not the player can use gk_zoom to narrow the camera’s field of vision. Operation: is_zoom_disabled.

Name: bCanObjectsMakeSound
Description: Determines if scene props can emit sounds inside a scene. Different values on client and server break network compatibility and cause a crash.

Name: bApplyAllAmmoDamageModifiers
Description: Added missile damage to weapons damage for any ranged weapons. Otherwise only for bows and crossbows.

Name: bUseMissileDamageType
Description: Use missile (arrow, bolt, bullet) damage type (cut, pierce, blunt) instead of launcher item (bow, crossbow, musket, pistol) damage type.

Name: fFarPlaneDistance
Description: Amount of units (in centimeters) that the render plane extends out from the camera inside of scenes.

Name: bCanRunFasterWithSkills
Description: Determines how agility and athletics affect running speed.

Name: bHorsesTryRunningAway
Description: Determines if riderless horse agents will try to get away from aggressive agents.

Name: bHorsesRearWithAttack
Description: Determines if horses rear upon being struck with enough damage with thrust polearm blow.

Name: bSyncRagdollEffects
Description: Determines if ragdolls are synced between client and server.

Name: bCanAdjustCameraDistance
Description: Determines if the player can use gk_camera_closer and gk_camera_farther to adjust the default camera position.

Name: bRestrictAttacksMoreInMultiplayer
Description: For multiplayer if an agent is stabbing or doing an overhead attack then the limit of the rotational speed will be set to 11 instead 16.

Name: bNoFriendlyFireForBots
Description: Determines if AI agents can cause friendly fire.

Name: fLancePikeEffectSpeed
Description: Determines the necessary speed of the horse at which the polearm causes horses rear.

Name: fLancePikeEffectMinLength
Description: Determines minimum lenght for polearm causes horses rear.

Name: fLancePikeEffectMinDamage
Description: Determines minimum inflicted damage at which the polearm causes horses rear.

Name: bCanUseScenePropsInSinglePlayer
Description: Determines if player in singleplayer can interact with scene_props like in multiplayer (using doors and drawbridges for example).

Name: iMeekModifierSpeedBonus
Description: Speed modifier for the horses that have the imod_timid modifier.

Name: iTimidModifierSpeedBonus
Description: Speed modifier for the horses that have the imod_meek modifier

Name: bShorterPistolAiming
Description: Required aiming animation progress for the shot is shorter for pistols, same as for muskets and crossbows. Otherwise only for muskets and crossbows.

Name: bCanCrouch
Description: Determines if human agents can crouch. Different values on client and server break network compatibility due to replication.

Name: bUsePhasedReload
Description: Determines if reloading can be done in steps. That means if your reload has been interrupted, you’ll start from the begining of the phase at which the reload was stopped. Phased reload works if you use itcf_reload_musket or itcf_reload_pistol for the ranged weapon.

Name: bUseCrossbowAsFirearm
Description: Determines whether crossbows will fire with smoke and a sound of explosion or with normal crossbow sound. Allow players reload crossbows while running or walking.

Name: bCanReloadWhileMoving
Description: Determines if ai agent can reload crossbows while running or walking. Does not affect horseback. Needs bUseCrossbowAsFirearm to be enabled as well. Also limits movement speed when reloading for both ai and players.

Name: fBraceRotationLimit
Description: Affects items with the flag itp_is_pike and is used for rotation speed limiting while bracing spears (e.g. in NW). If the turning acceleration is less than 0.01 or the set value (whichever is higher) the game engine plays the pike crouch animation (anim_crouch_pike) and otherwise the crouch staff animation (anim_crouch_staff). You can obviously not give a value below the default one of 0.01 and if you provide a big value (it seems like 0.5 is enough) you can completely override the canceling effect.

Name: bUseHorseSlopeForRiderPosition
Description: Сorrect legs position for riders on steep slopes.

Name: bTurnAgentAsMultiplayer
Description: Rotate the agent in the direction of view in singleplayer, just like in multiplayer.

Name: bApplySkillForCouchingDamage
Description: Apply proficiency, power strike and strength to couching damage.

Name: bAdvancedTurnRateFormulaForMelee
Description: For multiplayer if an agent is release melee overswing or thrust attack instead default limit of the rotational speed use formula taking into account the type of weapon, the weight and length of the weapon.

Name: bAdjustedSweetSpot
Description: Changed sweetspot calculation.

Name: bAdjustedAttackHoldFactor
Description: Changed hold factor calculation.

Name: bAdjustedCrushthrough
Description: Changed crushthrough calculation.

Name: bAdjustedShieldSkillDamage
Description: Changed damage formula for shield on shield hit depending on shield skill.

Name: bAdjustedStagger
Description: Changed stagger formula for thrown, bow and crossbow, more chance when hitting legs.

Name: bAdjustedKnockdown
Description: Changed knockdown formula, more chance when hitting legs or head.

Name: bPolearmStagger
Description: Stagger for polearms.

Name: bNerfHorseManeuver
Description: Reduced horse turn speed.

Name: bItemSpeedAffectSpeedBonusForDamage
Description: Item speed for melee weapon affects speed bonus for damage calculation.

Name: bTakeAttackersSpeedForRangedSpeedBonus
Description: Whether to take into account speed of shooter agent together with speed of missile to calculate damage of missile, or only speed of missile.

Name: bTweakCrushthroughDamageReduction
Description: With crushthrough for attack power use multiplier from range 0.7 - 0.8 instead 0.4 - 0.6.

Name: bRandomTroopEquipping
Description: Changes the algorithm of random equipment for troops and does not take into account the value of the item.

Name: bReduceDamageRandomness
Description: Random multiplier range for soaked and reduced damage 0.7 - 0.75 instead 0.45 - 1.0.

Name: bParry
Description: Not tested yet.

Name: bCouchedLanceChambered
Description: Possible to chamber couched lance.

Name: fKickRange
Description: Squared range for kick, so 0.16 means 0.4 meters.

Name: fHorseBumpMinSpeed
Description: Minimum speed for horse charge.

Name: bAllowKickDuringMeleeAttacks
Description: This is warbang bug. https://forums.taleworlds.com/index.php?threads/warband-script-enhancer-2-v1-0-6-4.384882/page-14#post-9679055

Name: bMoreProficiencyEffectForMovingSpeedWhileReloading
Description: Changes formula for moving speed while reloading for more effect from reloadable weapon proficiency.

Name: bShowCrosshair
Description: Show crosshair for singleplayer. Operation: set_show_crosshair.

Name: bHorseFriendlyFire
Description: Horse charge friendly fire for singleplayer. Operation: set_horse_friendly_fire.

Name: bSyncBlockDirections
Description: Determines if block directions are synced between client and server.

Name: bShieldSkillAffectsProtectionArea
Description: Determines if shield skill affects shield's area of protection.
